ecosystem_mentions.description: Every mention of an open source project, tool, or technology in this document

project_name.description: Name of the mentioned project or tool

mention_type.description: One of: talk_topic, case_study, comparison, adoption_stat, tutorial, criticism, recommendation

sentiment.description: positive, neutral, or negative framing of the mention

prominence.description: How prominent the mention is: keynote, dedicated_session, section, passing_mention

author.description: Speaker, author, or organization behind the mention if stated

summary.description: 1-2 sentence summary of the context of the mention

source_context.description: Where in the document this appears: session title, section heading, slide title
